title: isodon calcicola
intro: Isodon calcicola, also known as Himalayan isodon, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a type of perennial herb native to the Himalayas and parts of Asia, traditionally used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Isodon calcicola is often dried and made into tea, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
